Purpose: Main mounting platform for the fixture
Holds the actuator or servo being tested
Attaches to the actuator shaft to apply rotational load
Mounts to different holes on the load arm to vary loading position
Holds a future sensor for position or limit feedback
Covers the moving arm area during testing
Future sensor for detecting arm position or end limits
Future controller or data acquisition system for logging test results
Mounts fixture components to the base plate
